steps.note: Phase 1: one face + LED fresh. Face center-x=0.52 -> near-center; deadband should mostly hold (gentle, no darting).
Phase 2: second (synthetic) face far right -> centroid shifts right -> [FRAMING] move; LED clamp caps the pan so the LED stays in frame.
Phase 3: LED disappears (face stays). After led_search_timeout_s (5s), [FRAMING] LED-scan sweep steps should appear.
Phase 4: LED returns -> scan stops, clamped centroid resumes.
